info.longName: iShares iBonds Oct 2034 Term TIPS ETF

funds_data.description: The fund seeks to track the investment results of the underlying index, which consists of inflation-protected public obligations of the U.S. Treasury, commonly known as “TIPS,” that are scheduled to mature between January 1, 2034 and October 15, 2034, inclusive. It will invest at least 80% of its assets in the component securities of the underlying index.
